mnemonics.title: Operator Precedence
mnemonics.content: Please Excuse My Dear Aunt C (Parentheses, Exponents, Multiply/Divide, Add/Subtract, Comma)

mnemonics.title: Bitwise Operators
mnemonics.content: AND(&) is multiplication, OR(|) is addition in binary

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a pyramid: () at top, then unary ops, then */%, then +-, then comparisons, then logical ops, then assignment at base
Left shift (<<) as pushing zeros from right, right shift (>>) as dropping bits from right

analogies.analogy: Like converting recipe measurements - adding cups (int) to liters (float) needs conversion to common unit
Like checking if alarm is armed before entering house - skip unnecessary checks
